pageContext.name: Darth Maul
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios are proud to announce the latest from the Legacy Replica 1:4 scale line - Darth Maul!   From Star Wars: Episode I - The Phantom Menace, this Darth Maul Statue is a limited edition, highly detailed, and hand-painted Star Wars collectible.  Star Wars fans, don't miss your chance to add the Darth Maul 1:4 Statue to your Star Wars collection!
